title: Create Immersive Aircrafts - Recipes
description: Changes recipes of Immersive Aircrafts to work better with Create
body:
This is just the data pack that changes recipes for immersive aircrafts to better fit the create mod and it's progression, recommended to be used with my [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-immersive-aircrafts) to change the texture

Updated to include recipes for the warship and bamboo hopper, JEI is recommended to view recipes

Make sure to install both the data pack and the resource pack correctly otherwise textures and recipes won't match properly

Obviously Requires Create and Immersive Aircrafts
